metadata.philosophy: Time-boxed DoR ceremonies per circle, calibrated to skill type and ceremony cadence.

orchestrator.rationale: Orchestrator standup is a brief sync — 5 min max to unblock others.

assessor.rationale: Assessor reviews require deeper DoR inspection of acceptance criteria and test coverage.

innovator.rationale: Innovation refinement needs structured hypothesis framing and experiment design.

analyst.rationale: Analyst deep dives require full data pipeline validation and metric baseline verification.

seeker.rationale: Seeker explorations are learning-focused — keep DoR lightweight to preserve discovery momentum.

intuitive.rationale: Intuitive sensemaking sessions are retrospective-driven, not planning-heavy.
